news.title: Union Bank led PSU banks with a surge of up to 6% after bond yields dropped.
news.summary: Union Bank led PSU banks with a surge of up to 6% after bond yields dropped.

news.title:
PSU Bank index gains 4.5% as bond yields cool off; Union Bank, Bank of Maharashtra lead with 5% surge.
SBI, PNB, Canara Bank among others rise 4-5%; India's 10-year bond yield drops 15bps to 6.9%.
news.summary:
PSU Bank index gains 4.5% as bond yields cool off; Union Bank, Bank of Maharashtra lead with 5% surge.
SBI, PNB, Canara Bank among others rise 4-5%; India's 10-year bond yield drops 15bps to 6.9%.

news.title:
BoFA upgraded SBI to 'Buy', raising its target price to ₹1,200, citing value in large banks.
Union Bank and Bank of India downgraded to 'Neutral' due to asset quality risks; trading down up to 3%.
news.summary:
BoFA upgraded SBI to 'Buy', raising its target price to ₹1,200, citing value in large banks.
Union Bank and Bank of India downgraded to 'Neutral' due to asset quality risks; trading down up to 3%.

news.title:
Union Bank of India report forecasts crude oil at $80-85/barrel in 2026, not $70, citing global uncertainties.
High oil prices, weak rupee, and liquidity issues may slow GDP to 6.5% in FY27 and raise inflation above 4.5%.
news.summary:
Union Bank of India report forecasts crude oil at $80-85/barrel in 2026, not $70, citing global uncertainties.
High oil prices, weak rupee, and liquidity issues may slow GDP to 6.5% in FY27 and raise inflation above 4.5%.

news.title:
PSU banks gain investor focus post-Q4 updates; steady growth in deposits, advances seen.
BoB, PNB, Union Bank report YoY/QoQ growth; BoB dips 0.8%, PNB up 0.4%, Union Bank gains 0.6%.
news.summary:
PSU banks gain investor focus post-Q4 updates; steady growth in deposits, advances seen.
BoB, PNB, Union Bank report YoY/QoQ growth; BoB dips 0.8%, PNB up 0.4%, Union Bank gains 0.6%.

news.title:
Banking stocks, including HDFC Bank, Yes Bank, Kotak Mahindra Bank, IDBI Bank, Union Bank of India, and Bank of Baroda, will be in focus due to Q4 FY26 updates.
HDFC Bank posted 10-12% growth in advances and 12.8% deposit rise; Yes Bank, IDBI Bank, and Kotak showed double-digit growth in key metrics.
news.summary:
Banking stocks, including HDFC Bank, Yes Bank, Kotak Mahindra Bank, IDBI Bank, Union Bank of India, and Bank of Baroda, will be in focus due to Q4 FY26 updates.
HDFC Bank posted 10-12% growth in advances and 12.8% deposit rise; Yes Bank, IDBI Bank, and Kotak showed double-digit growth in key metrics.

news.title:
PNB, Union Bank, and IDFC FIRST Bank report credit growth surpassing deposit growth in March quarter.
This trend highlights sustained loan demand amid tight liquidity conditions.
news.summary:
PNB, Union Bank, and IDFC FIRST Bank report credit growth surpassing deposit growth in March quarter.
This trend highlights sustained loan demand amid tight liquidity conditions.

news.title:
Union Bank of India elevates 3 General Managers to Chief General Managers from 01.04.2026.
Promoted executives include K Pramod Kumar Reddy, Sumit Srivastava, and Dhirendra Jain.
news.summary:
Union Bank of India elevates 3 General Managers to Chief General Managers from 01.04.2026.
Promoted executives include K Pramod Kumar Reddy, Sumit Srivastava, and Dhirendra Jain.

news.title:
Union Bank of India shows bearish signals with neckline break on high volume.
MACD is negative, RSI below 50, and price trades below moving average.
news.summary:
Union Bank of India shows bearish signals with neckline break on high volume.
MACD is negative, RSI below 50, and price trades below moving average.

news.title:
RBI penalized Bank of India, Central Bank of India, Union Bank, and Pine Labs for non-compliance.
Penalties imposed: Rs 95.4L on BOI, Rs 63.6L on CBI, Rs 58.5L on UBI, Rs 3.1L on Pine Labs.
news.summary:
RBI penalized Bank of India, Central Bank of India, Union Bank, and Pine Labs for non-compliance.
Penalties imposed: Rs 95.4L on BOI, Rs 63.6L on CBI, Rs 58.5L on UBI, Rs 3.1L on Pine Labs.

news.title:
RBI fined Union Bank of India Rs 95.4L for regulatory lapses.
Lapses include delays in crediting unauthorized transactions and rule non-compliance.
news.summary:
RBI fined Union Bank of India Rs 95.4L for regulatory lapses.
Lapses include delays in crediting unauthorized transactions and rule non-compliance.

news.title:
Union Bank gains focus as Nifty indices undergo semi-annual rejig.
Inflows of approximately USD 75M expected for Union Bank.
news.summary:
Union Bank gains focus as Nifty indices undergo semi-annual rejig.
Inflows of approximately USD 75M expected for Union Bank.

news.title:
ICRA reaffirmed Union Bank of India's AAA stable ratings for Tier II bonds and increased certificate of deposit limits to ₹45,000 crore.
Union Bank's strong earnings, high provision coverage, and improved asset quality support its stable outlook, despite monitoring required on slippages.
news.summary:
ICRA reaffirmed Union Bank of India's AAA stable ratings for Tier II bonds and increased certificate of deposit limits to ₹45,000 crore.
Union Bank's strong earnings, high provision coverage, and improved asset quality support its stable outlook, despite monitoring required on slippages.

news.title:
Union Bank and Hitachi Energy gain on growth optimism, driven by sectoral triggers.
Kaynes Tech sees interest on rising demand expectations from higher temperatures.
news.summary:
Union Bank and Hitachi Energy gain on growth optimism, driven by sectoral triggers.
Kaynes Tech sees interest on rising demand expectations from higher temperatures.

news.title:
Union Bank of India held an investors/analysts meet with Millennium Capital on 24th March 2026.
The meet, conducted virtually, adhered to SEBI disclosure regulations using public documents.
news.summary:
Union Bank of India held an investors/analysts meet with Millennium Capital on 24th March 2026.
The meet, conducted virtually, adhered to SEBI disclosure regulations using public documents.

news.title:
Union Bank issues ₹7,500 Cr long-term bonds for infra, housing.
Bonds are 10-year, 7.16% coupon rate, CARE/ICRA AAA-rated, listed on NSE.
news.summary:
Union Bank issues ₹7,500 Cr long-term bonds for infra, housing.
Bonds are 10-year, 7.16% coupon rate, CARE/ICRA AAA-rated, listed on NSE.

news.title:
Kotak Mahindra Bank, SBI, Tata Motors, LIC Housing Finance, Union Bank highlighted.
Focus includes corporate announcements and IPO details for trading session.
news.summary:
Kotak Mahindra Bank, SBI, Tata Motors, LIC Housing Finance, Union Bank highlighted.
Focus includes corporate announcements and IPO details for trading session.

news.title:
Union Bank raised ₹3,000 crore via bonds; green shoe option expands potential to ₹7,500 crore.
Ashok Leyland to invest ₹375 crore in UK subsidiary; Tata Motors PV to hike ICE vehicle prices by 0.5% from April 2026.
news.summary:
Union Bank raised ₹3,000 crore via bonds; green shoe option expands potential to ₹7,500 crore.
Ashok Leyland to invest ₹375 crore in UK subsidiary; Tata Motors PV to hike ICE vehicle prices by 0.5% from April 2026.

news.title:
Bombay HC quashes DRT's stay on post-sale process of a mortgaged flat auctioned by Union Bank of India.
HC noted borrowers and defaulters often delay recovery by taking no action during the bank's process.
news.summary:
Bombay HC quashes DRT's stay on post-sale process of a mortgaged flat auctioned by Union Bank of India.
HC noted borrowers and defaulters often delay recovery by taking no action during the bank's process.

news.title:
Union Bank of India received ₹93.8B in bids from qualified institutional buyers.
The bank accepted ₹30B in bonds with a 7.16% coupon rate.
news.summary:
Union Bank of India received ₹93.8B in bids from qualified institutional buyers.
The bank accepted ₹30B in bonds with a 7.16% coupon rate.
